title: Intel’s AI-Fueled Forecast Shows That Comeback Is Gaining Steam
description: Intel Corp. delivered a revenue forecast that shattered Wall Street estimates, indicating that booming data center spending is helping fuel a long-awaited turnaround.

title: Robotics Startup Genesis in Talks to Raise About $500 Million
description: AI robotics startup Genesis AI is in talks with investors to raise around $500 million in a new funding round, according to people familiar with the efforts.

title: Nvidia Signs $1.5 Billion Accord With Amkor for Chip Packaging
description: Nvidia Corp. signed a $1.5 billion agreement with Amkor Technology Inc. to help bolster the company’s chip packaging facilities, part of a broader push to expand semiconductor operations in the US.
